overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing a character riding a mechanical Sunwing creature. The sequence begins with a launch from ancient stone ruins, followed by flight over tropical coastal waters, beaches, and open ocean, featuring dynamic aerial maneuvers including diving and banking before approaching the shoreline again.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone ruins platform over coastal waters

events.description: mechanical Sunwing creature takes off from stone platform and spreads wings fully
leaving the ruins structure behind, flying over open coastal water toward the horizon

agents.ego_description: character mounted on the mechanical Sunwing as it launches from the ruins and gains altitude over the misty coastal water

entered.detail: ancient stone structure with archways and weathered blocks covered in moss
forested cliffside with evergreen trees descending to the waterline
calm coastal waters with light mist hovering above the surface
small rocky outcrop with sparse vegetation rising from the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an ancient stone ruin platform surrounded by morning mist. The mechanical Sunwing launches into flight, spreading its large articulated wings, and ascends over the coastal waters. The camera follows closely from behind as the creature leaves the ruins behind, with forested cliffs visible to the left and rocky islands dotting the water ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical coastal waters with sandy beaches and turquoise lagoons

events.description: creature banks sharply left to follow the coastline, revealing beaches below
bright sun glare appears as the creature turns toward the sun, creating lens flare

agents.ego_description: flying along the tropical coastline, passing over turquoise lagoons and white sandy beaches while maintaining altitude

entered.detail: pristine white sand beach curving along the coastline with gentle waves lapping at the shore
shallow tropical water with vibrant turquoise coloration and visible underwater formations
large weathered rock formation rising from the water near the beach

segments.scene_description: The creature banks left to follow the coastline, revealing pristine sandy beaches and turquoise lagoons below. The sun creates a bright glare as the creature turns, illuminating the crystal-clear water. The forested cliffs recede into the distance while rocky outcrops dot the coastal waters to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ocean with distant mountain ranges and dynamic wave action

events.description: creature dives down to skim the ocean waves, creating spray and wake
creature pulls up sharply and banks right, climbing back to cruising altitude

agents.ego_description: performing high-speed aerial maneuvers over the open ocean, diving toward the wave crests and climbing sharply

entered.detail: hazy mountain peaks visible on the horizon across the open water
deep blue ocean with white-capped waves and visible swells

segments.scene_description: Leaving the coastal features behind, the creature flies over the open ocean with distant mountains visible on the horizon. It performs dynamic maneuvers, diving down to skim the wave crests and creating white spray, then pulling up to gain altitude again. The water transitions from turquoise to deep blue as the creature banks sharply over the swells.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal approach with wave skimming and shoreline visibility

events.description: creature slows and extends wings fully, transitioning to a gliding posture low over the water
approaching shoreline with palm trees and sandy beach becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: slowing down and approaching the shoreline, flying low over the waves with the sun creating a backlight effect

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the approaching shoreline, indicating tropical coastal vegetation
sandy beach at the water's edge becoming visible as the creature approaches land

segments.scene_description: The creature slows its flight, extending its wings to glide low over the churning waves as it approaches the shoreline. The sun creates a bright backlight effect, silhouetting the mechanical wings. Palm trees and the sandy beach of the approaching coast become visible ahead, indicating the end of the open ocean crossing and a return to land.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey that begins at a misty ancient ruin and transitions into a high-speed flight over a vast, shimmering ocean before returning to a tropical coastline. It begins as a mechanical Sunwing launches from a stone platform, ascending through morning mist to reveal forested cliffs and rocky islands below. As the creature banks left, the scene shifts from the ruins to a bright, sun-glared vista of turquoise lagoons and pristine sandy beaches. The camera then follows the creature as it leaves the coast for the open ocean, where the water deepens to a dark blue and the flight becomes more dynamic, diving to skim white wave crests before pulling back up toward distant mountains. Finally, the creature slows into a low glide over churning waves, silhouetted by a bright backlight as palm trees and sandy shores emerge ahead.
